issue_title: Fix pricing calculator: hide excluded add-ons (like Data Pipelines) f…
issue_body_preview:
Data Pipelines was showing as a product add-on on the Product Analytics tab even though it is no longer an add on. Apply the same EXCLUDED_ADDON_TYPES filter already used on the addons page.

## Changes

*Please describe.*

*Add screenshots or screen recordings for visual / UI-focused changes.
test_description_zh: 打开定价页面的产品分析（Product Analytics）标签，查看定价计算器中显示的附加组件（add-ons）列表，检查是否包含 Data Pipelines 等已排除的附加组件项。
expected_result_zh: 定价计算器的 Product Analytics 标签下不应显示 Data Pipelines 附加组件，仅展示当前有效的附加组件选项。
